chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-105 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 04-12-2025 Appellant is called absent. **** Appellant is called absent; no intimation is received. Even on the last date of hearing, appellant remained absent, which reflects that the appellant has lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
